title: Federal Reserve Holds Rates Steady
content: The Federal Reserve announced today it will hold the benchmark interest rate steady, citing stable inflation figures and continued labour market strength. Analysts had widely expected this decision following recent economic data.

title: New Overdraft Regulations Take Effect
content: New federal regulations governing overdraft fee disclosures take effect next month, requiring banks to provide clearer upfront notice before charging overdraft fees on customer accounts. Consumer advocacy groups have welcomed the change.

title: Regional Bank Announces Branch Expansion
content: A regional bank announced plans to open twelve new branches across three states over the next fiscal year, citing strong customer demand in underserved suburban markets.

title: Quarterly Mortgage Rate Trends
content: Mortgage rates edged slightly higher this quarter amid broader market volatility, though remain within the range seen over the past eighteen months according to industry analysts. title: Digital Banking Adoption Continues to Rise
content: A new industry survey found that digital banking adoption continues to rise across all age demographics, with mobile check deposit and peer-to-peer payment features seeing the fastest growth in usage.
